hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Eighth project type (crypto verification + room migration + UI). 3-phase completed. All gates passed first try. 6 atomic commits.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All gates passed first try. No fix cycles needed. E2E failures all pre-existing CSP nonce (46 vs 43 baseline).

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 instructions compliant. SHA-256 sorted keys for emoji. Fresh Megolm on migration. Passive emoji display. Counter inside encrypted payload. Migration banner with task carryover message.
